text: Today there are a variety of methods applied in image processing for removing noise, image sharpening, segmentation, feature extraction and image classification. In fact all these methods are applied to enhance or to extract important information from the images and also for applying automatic decision in many fields. The old image processing methods always depend on manually designed algorithms and also by using empirical knowledge. But the Deep Learning (DL) methods can develop its own features of the data and this way can extract the hidden features that can not be extracted with old traditional methods. This paper is investigating the old traditional image processing methods as well as the new developing Deep Learning (DL) image processing methods. In the image restoration and enhancement techniques, Denoising CNN and RetinexDIP, the models that are developed for improving the image quality, by eliminating the noise, have applied successfully on several images but the parameters adjustment for all the models is causing difficulties. Also, the applied models do not give the best results in some complex real world images. For the image segmentation techniques the U-Net and Mask-RCNN are very successful with high accuracy, but also cause difficulties especially when some objects are overlapped with each other. For the feature extraction and image classification techniques, both the simple as well as hybrid models such as the standard CNN, hybrid CNN-LSTM have also give very promising results for the applied images, although with some drawbacks such as the large amount of computations time required from the models and also the lack of interpretation of the models developed. This paper also investigates on these downsides of the models. In all these applications of image processing methods, this paper also have investigated also the applications of the image processing methods on medical images, also on the satellite images and finally on the real time images.
